response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform leadership; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of cloud compute platform ownership, distributed systems design, or mentoring in cloud/DevOps contexts, making them a poor fit for the core technical requirements.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Proven experience in open-source platform development and mentoring via workshops
Demonstrated ability to own complex, cross-functional projects (e.g., GISCollective)
concerns: Only minimal C++ exposure (LabWindows/CVI role), far below 8-year requirement
No evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or distributed systems design at scale
Lacks documented experience mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers or establishing cloud architecture best practices
